subject: VFC Communication fails because MSB service name
commit_message:
VFC Communication fails because MSB service name

Change-Id: I26e27cfb3b973bbffd0a94e3ec8411f5218cdf4f
Issue-ID: OOM-804
Signed-off-by: mahendrr <mahendra.raghuwanshi@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Hi Mike,

I looked into the OOM-804, I found that all the pods are not coming up because of their dependency on MSB service which is being created using the service name from values.yaml but vfc pods are looking for release name and msb-iag.
All the pods are coming up after this change.

Thx,
Mahendra

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Verified:
